title: Birthday Girl Assorted Colors Latex Balloons (22cm) Pack of 10 - Festive and Fun Decorations for Birthday Parties, Pink
features: BIRTHDAY GIRL BALLOONS: Make your little one's birthday bash even more special with our birthday girl assorted colors latex balloons, perfect for creating a fun and festive atmosphere at any birthday party.

ASSORTED COLORS: This pack of 10 balloons comes in a vibrant mix of colors, including 2 shades of pink and white, adding a splash of excitement to your birthday decorations and leaving lasting memories for everyone to share.

HIGH-QUALITY LATEX MATERIAL: Made from durable and eco-friendly latex, these 22cm balloons offer a long-lasting decoration, ensuring your party stays looking fantastic throughout the celebration and beyond.

EASY-TO-USE & VERSATILE: Inflate our 22cm balloons with air or helium, and tie them together for an eye-catching arrangement, or let them float individually around your party space to create a captivating, celebratory atmosphere.

IDEAL FOR BIRTHDAY PARTIES: Whether it's a first birthday, a milestone celebration, or a themed event, our birthday girl latex balloons are the perfect addition to any party, helping create an unforgettable experience for your child and guests.
description: Product Description Create a fabulously festive party scene with these Latex Birthday Girl Balloons. Supplied in an assortment of pretty pink colours, these balloons are a quick way to add bursts of colour to a girl's birthday party or princess party. With "Birthday Girl" lettering and hearts design printed on one side, these party balloons are designed to be filled with air and hung from the ceiling to ensure the printed text is right-side up. Whether they're placed individually throughout the room or bunched together in balloon bouquets, these latex balloons will be a cheerful addition to the celebration. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 10 Latex Assorted Pink Birthday Girl Balloons
